scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.pack: npm run build:all && xcopy /E /I frontend\.next\standalone FINAL_RELEASE\frontend && xcopy /E /I frontend\.next\static FINAL_RELEASE\frontend\.next\static && xcopy /E /I frontend\public FINAL_RELEASE\frontend\public && xcopy /E /I backend\dist FINAL_RELEASE\backend && copy IIS-Deployment\backend_web.config FINAL_RELEASE\backend\web.config
